NAME: STATE_SPEC_ELGBLTY_GRP_CD_LTST 
LONG NAME: STATE_SPEC_ELGBLTY_GRP_CD_LTST 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
6 
FILE(S): 
Annual DE base 
SOURCE: 
T-MSIS annual demographic and eligibility TAF 
VALUES: 
Maximum six alphanumeric characters (may include spaces) 
Null/missing = source value is missing or unknown 
COMMENT: 
State-specific composite of eligibility mapping factors used to create the corresponding MAS and BOE 
values.
